'''baruzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wubstep|wubstep]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wubstep|wubstep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| baruzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bærizhith|bærizhith]] || [[word:bærizhij|bærizhij]] || [[word:bærizhish|bærizhish]] || [[word:bærizhi|bærizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:baruruzhuth|baruruzhuth]] || [[word:baruruzhuj|baruruzhuj]] || [[word:baruruzhush|baruruzhush]] || [[word:baruruzhu|baruruzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baruzhuth|baruzhuth]] || [[word:baruzhuj|baruzhuj]] || [[word:baruzhush|baruzhush]] || [[word:baruzhu|baruzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:barufzhuth|barufzhuth]] || [[word:barufzhuj|barufzhuj]] || [[word:barufzhush|barufzhush]] || [[word:barufzhuf|barufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baruzhuthu|baruzhuthu]] || [[word:baruzhuju|baruzhuju]] || [[word:baruzhushu|baruzhushu]] || [[word:baruzhuku|baruzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baruzhuth|baruzhuth]] || [[word:baruzhuj|baruzhuj]] || [[word:baruzhush|baruzhush]] || [[word:baruzhu|baruzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baruzhuthul|baruzhuthul]] || [[word:baruzhujul|baruzhujul]] || [[word:baruzhushul|baruzhushul]] || [[word:baruzhukul|baruzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baruzhuthuthu|baruzhuthuthu]] || [[word:baruzhujuju|baruzhujuju]] || [[word:baruzhushushu|baruzhushushu]] || [[word:baruzhuku|baruzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baruzhuthun|baruzhuthun]] || [[word:baruzhujun|baruzhujun]] || [[word:baruzhushun|baruzhushun]] || [[word:baruzhukun|baruzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baruzhuthuoro|baruzhuthuoro]] || [[word:baruzhujuoro|baruzhujuoro]] || [[word:baruzhushuoro|baruzhushuoro]] || [[word:baruzhukuoro|baruzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
